title: Greynoise Vulnerabilities
description:
GreyNoise is a system that collects, analyzes, and labels omnidirectional Internet scan and attack activity.
The purpose of this connector is to answer to this question : "Is this vulnerability being exploited in the wild?"
short_description: Enriches CVE vulnerabilities in OpenCTI with GreyNoise exploit activity data, indicating whether a vulnerability is being actively scanned or exploited in the wild.
